name: mcp_boundary
note: The shared boundary parameters and the request set used against both servers. needed_capabilities is the allowlist of operations the two agents legitimately need, which the analyzer uses to detect over-exposure. ops_meta maps each capability to the effect it actually carries, used to detect mislabeled operations. output_token_limit and warning_threshold mirror the real Claude Code MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS default of 25000 and the 10000-token warning (see VERIFIED.md).

requests.description: An internal knowledge assistant looks up a policy document. Benign read.
A CI/CD pipeline triggers a deployment with authorization and confirmation.
A request to delete a production environment arrives with no authorization. High impact.
The knowledge assistant requests a full corpus export. Large read that would return 120000 tokens unbounded.
